## Type of Change

- [ ] New platform guide (`guides/`)
- [ ] New framework guide (`frameworks/`)
- [ ] New database guide (`guides/`)
- [ ] Improvement to existing guide
- [ ] Bug fix (broken link, typo, incorrect command)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the [guide template](../CONTRIBUTING.md#guide-template)
- [ ] I tested every command in this guide on a fresh project
- [ ] I included all required sections (Prerequisites, Steps, Environment Variables, Custom Domain, Troubleshooting)
- [ ] I added the guide to the appropriate table in `README.md` (if new guide)
- [ ] I used kebab-case for the filename
- [ ] I included free tier information where applicable
- [ ] I included actual commands, not just descriptions
